name: Neon Glow Sample
svg:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 450 450" width="450" height="450">
  <defs>
    
  </defs>
  <rect width="450" height="450" fill="#000000"/>
  
      <defs>
        <filter id="pinkGlow" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
          <feGaussianBlur in="SourceGraphic" stdDeviation="6" result="blur"/>
          <feMerge>
            <feMergeNode in="blur"/>
            <feMergeNode in="blur"/>
            <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
          </feMerge>
        </filter>
        <filter id="blueGlow" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
          <feGaussianBlur in="SourceGraphic" stdDeviation="4" result="blur"/>
          <feMerge>
            <feMergeNode in="blur"/>
            <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
          </feMerge>
        </filter>
      </defs>
      
      <!-- Background with radial glow -->
      <radialGradient id="bgGlow" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
        <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#9400d3" stop-opacity="0.15"/>
        <stop offset="100%" stop-color="transparent"/>
      </radialGradient>
      <rect width="450" height="450" fill="#000000"/>
      <circle cx="225" cy="225" r="225" fill="url(#bgGlow)"/>
      
      <!-- Neon rings -->
      <circle cx="225" cy="225" r="190" fill="none" stroke="#ff1493" stroke-width="3" filter="url(#pinkGlow)" opacity="0.8"/>
      <circle cx="225" cy="225" r="170" fill="none" stroke="#00ffff" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#blueGlow)" opacity="0.6"/>
      <circle cx="225" cy="225" r="150" fill="none" stroke="#9400d3" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
      
      <!-- Neon markers -->
      <circle cx="225" cy="95" r="8" fill="#ff1493" filter="url(#blueGlow)"/>
      <circle cx="290" cy="112.41669750802298" r="4" fill="#00ffff" filter="url(#blueGlow)"/>
      <circle cx="337.58330249197707" cy="160" r="4" fill="#9400d3" filter="url(#blueGlow)"/>
      <circle cx="355" cy="225" r="8" fill="#39ff14" filter="url(#blueGlow)"/>
      <circle cx="337.58330249197707" cy="290" r="4" fill="#ff1493" filter="url(#blueGlow)"/>
      <circle cx="290" cy="337.583302491977" r="4" fill="#00ffff" filter="url(#blueGlow)"/>
      <circle cx="225" cy="355" r="8" fill="#9400d3" filter="url(#blueGlow)"/>
      <circle cx="160.00000000000003" cy="337.58330249197707" r="4" fill="#39ff14" filter="url(#blueGlow)"/>
      <circle cx="112.41669750802296" cy="290" r="4" fill="#ff1493" filter="url(#blueGlow)"/>
      <circle cx="95" cy="225.00000000000003" r="8" fill="#00ffff" filter="url(#blueGlow)"/>
      <circle cx="112.41669750802298" cy="160" r="4" fill="#9400d3" filter="url(#blueGlow)"/>
      <circle cx="159.99999999999994" cy="112.41669750802299" r="4" fill="#39ff14" filter="url(#blueGlow)"/>
      
      <!-- Main time display -->
      <g filter="url(#pinkGlow)">
        <text x="225" y="225" fill="#ff1493" font-size="72" font-family="'Courier New', monospace" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">01:34</text>
      </g>
      
      <!-- Seconds with different color -->
      <text x="225" y="290" fill="#39ff14" font-size="32" text-anchor="middle" 
            font-family="'Courier New', monospace" filter="url(#blueGlow)">
        :04
      </text>
      
      <!-- Date -->
      <text x="225" y="330" fill="#00ffff" font-size="14" text-anchor="middle" 
            font-family="'Courier New', monospace" opacity="0.8">
        THU, MAR 26
      </text>
      
      <!-- Decorative elements -->
      <line x1="150" y1="360" x2="300" y2="360" stroke="#9400d3" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#blueGlow)" opacity="0.5"/>
      
      <!-- Corner neons -->
      <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="20" fill="none" stroke="#ff1493" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#pinkGlow)" opacity="0.5"/>
      <circle cx="400" cy="50" r="20" fill="none" stroke="#00ffff" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#blueGlow)" opacity="0.5"/>
      <circle cx="50" cy="400" r="20" fill="none" stroke="#39ff14" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#blueGlow)" opacity="0.5"/>
      <circle cx="400" cy="400" r="20" fill="none" stroke="#9400d3" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#blueGlow)" opacity="0.5"/>
    
</svg>
